title: Pre-Employment Medical Examination. The licensed manning agency
content: 21 shall ensure that the Pre-Employment Medical Examination (PEME) conducted is in 22 accordance with prescribed and acceptable international standards, and the 23 requirements of the principal/employer. 24 25 The principal/employer shall shoulder the costs of the PEME of the seafarer under this 26 section, whatever the results of the said examination. 27 28
